opportunities.title: KV-Cache VRAM Memory Bottleneck
opportunities.developer_quote: Once you hit 32k tokens, VRAM becomes the primary bottleneck.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Non-attention O(1) Ephemeral Memory State (Constant VRAM Footprint)

opportunities.title: Astronomical Cloud API Token Costs & Latency
opportunities.developer_quote: The prefill phase is what kills latency when you send huge system prompts.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Sparse Relational Hash Indexing (Cut Token Usage by 45%+)

opportunities.title: Catastrophic Forgetting in Continual Learning
opportunities.developer_quote: Continual learning without catastrophic forgetting remains the holy grail.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Sparse Codebook Neuron Selection (Preserves 96.95% Base Weights)

opportunities.title: Needle-in-a-Haystack Context Degradation
opportunities.developer_quote: Long context length is useless if the model drops recall in the middle 50%.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Tier-1 Active Context Window Buffer with 100% Exact Line Recall

opportunities.title: Multi-Session State Loss & Chat Drift
opportunities.developer_quote: Building hierarchical summary buffers for chat retention is clunky and lossy.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Persistent Ephemeral Vector State (Zero Summary Drift Across Sessions)

opportunities.title: Verbose JSON Tool-Calling Token Waste
opportunities.developer_quote: Standard JSON tool calling consumes thousands of tokens per agent turn.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Compact Schema DSL Parser for Zero Token Schema Overhead

opportunities.title: Linear SSM vs. Attention Recall Tradeoff
opportunities.developer_quote: Mamba is linear time but struggles with exact verbatim code retrieval.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Hybrid Relational Competitive Update Engine (Fast & Exact)

opportunities.title: Vector RAG Code Chunking Fragmentation
opportunities.developer_quote: Vector search breaks AST code context, returning random text snippets.

opportunities.title: Consumer GPU Local Execution Limits (24GB VRAM)
opportunities.developer_quote: Running 27B-70B models locally on a single RTX 3090/4090 requires quantization.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Ultra-Sparse 3.05% Density Active Execution Engine for Consumer GPUs

opportunities.title: Un-verified Agentic Patch Generation
opportunities.developer_quote: Agents that output code patches without running tests silently break builds.
opportunities.echoregent_feature: Built-in PyTest & Search-and-Replace Execution Feedback Loop
